# Per-tag coreference overlay: canticle/canto/start-end/tag_no = identity-first label
# Upgrades under-specified 04-tags labels (bare names, periphrases) to their identity-first
# form, applied at load_tags() so every consumer sees the same per-tag identity.
# Generated by 05-registry/coreference.py; human-reviewable before committing.
